# TYPE cp_api_requests_total counter
cp_api_requests_total{path="/api/v1/runs",method="GET"} 4021

# TYPE cp_render_jobs_queued gauge
cp_render_jobs_queued 3
cp_build_info{version="1.2.3"} 1
